name: agency.self/git-mcp
description: A Git MCP server that doesn't suck

environmentVariables.name: GIT_REPO_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Default repository path for all tool requests. Can also be set via the --repo / --repo-path CLI argument. If omitted, each tool call must supply repo_path explicitly.

environmentVariables.name: GIT_ALLOW_NO_VERIFY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose a no_verify parameter on commit and push tools, passing --no-verify to Git and bypassing pre-commit / pre-push hooks.

environmentVariables.name: GIT_ALLOW_FORCE_PUSH
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose a force parameter on push tools. Remote branch protection rules (GitHub/GitLab) are still enforced server-side regardless.

environmentVariables.name: GIT_ALLOW_FLOW_HOOKS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to allow git_flow to execute git-flow-next-compatible hook and filter programs discovered from git config or repository hook locations.

environmentVariables.name: GIT_SIGNING_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Default signing key: a GPG key ID, an SSH public key path, or empty to use git's configured user.signingkey. Used when GIT_AUTO_SIGN_COMMITS or GIT_AUTO_SIGN_TAGS is enabled.

environmentVariables.name: GIT_SIGNING_FORMAT
environmentVariables.description: Signing format for commits and tags. Accepted values: openpgp, ssh, x509.

environmentVariables.name: GIT_AUTO_SIGN_COMMITS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to automatically sign all commits produced by this server.

environmentVariables.name: GIT_AUTO_SIGN_TAGS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to automatically sign all tags produced by this server.
